event.description: Intense solar particle event forces shelter-in-place

subsim_log.sexpr:
(let ((food 1.02)
              (water 0.77)
              (pop 10)
              (crisis 0.23)
              (trust 0.06))
          (let ((vote-sim (sub-sim 2
                  (let ((support (* trust (- 1.0 crisis)))
                        (opposition (* (- 1.0 trust) crisis)))
                    (if (> support opposition)
                      (list "proposal-passes" support)
                      (list "proposal-fails" opposition))))))
            (if (> crisis 0.7)
              (list "emergency-ration" vote-sim (* food 0.6))
              (list "governance-model" vote-sim trust))))

colonist_diaries.entry:

Mood: contemplative. Event: Intense solar particle event forces shelter-in-place.
Action: gather_water. Colony morale: strained.

Mood: anxious. Event: Intense solar particle event forces shelter-in-place.
Action: gather_food. Colony morale: strained.
